name: Beets in a Mustard Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Break eggs into the top of a double boiler and beat until foamy.
2. Add vinegar, sugar, dry mustard, and salt; blend well.
3. Dissolve Royal Lemon Gelatin in boiling water.
4. Add the gelatin mixture to the egg mixture and cook over simmering water, stirring frequently, until the mixture reaches custard consistency.
5. Pour into a 5-cup ring mold and chill until firm.
6. To serve, unmold and fill the center with pickled beets.
7. Makes 8 - 10 servings.
